item.title: SEC proposes rules covering crypto token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and digital asset trading venue market structure.
US regulators missed the GENIUS Act July 18 stablecoin rulemaking deadline; issuers must now plan against a January 2027 enforcement date.
Five US agencies jointly propose bank-grade KYC requirements for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act, covering USDC and USDT.
Crypto hackers stole $972M across a record 207 incidents in H1 2026, with cross-chain bridges accounting for $351M of losses.
South Korea releases H2 digital asset plan introducing stablecoin regulation, tokenized bond pilots, and a legal basis for spot crypto ETFs.
AUSTRAC's crypto Travel Rule took effect July 1 in Australia, mandating sender-recipient data on all transfers with no minimum threshold.
Bitcoin and Ethereum-linked protocols lost $35M across multiple attacks within hours on July 23, 2026.
Citi plans 2026 launch of an institutional crypto custody platform for asset managers, using a hybrid in-house and third-party model.
Deutsche Bank aims to launch crypto custody in 2026 in partnership with Bitpanda's technology unit and Swiss provider Taurus SA.
Cecabank, a Spanish wholesale custodian, launches MiCA-licensed crypto custody with exchange Bit2Me after securing Spain's CNMV approval.
Russia's State Duma adopts crypto exchange and custody licensing law with most provisions taking effect in September 2026.
California's Digital Financial Assets Law took effect July 1, establishing a dedicated state-level crypto exchange licensing regime.
Wanchain's Cardano-to-BNB bridge was exploited July 21 for approximately $10M in NIGHT tokens across four rapid transactions.
Verus Ethereum bridge lost $7.54M in a July 23 repeat exploit using the same contract vulnerability as a May attack.
BitMEX will close September 23 after a strategic review, ending 11 years as a major crypto derivatives exchange.
